# Aarogyayogawithshravanthi

> Live-guided daily yoga, face yoga, yoga therapy, and wellness programs led by expert instructor Shravanthi Raghu.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://aarogyayogawithshravanthi.com/) - Overview of the wellness programs, energy centers (Seven Chakras Harmony), benefits (calm, fat burn, strength, flexibility), and student video testimonials.
- [Classes](https://aarogyayogawithshravanthi.com/classes.html) - Details of active online yoga courses including Therapeutic Yoga, Face Yoga, Women's Wellness, and customized yoga paths.
- [About](https://aarogyayogawithshravanthi.com/about.html) - Professional bio of Shravanthi Raghu, a Certified Yoga Therapist (8+ years experience) specializing in spine/cervical care, Ayurveda nutrition, prenatal wellness, and MAT Pilates.
- [Gallery](https://aarogyayogawithshravanthi.com/gallery.html) - Photographic and video gallery of classes, workshops, and student transformation events.
- [Contact Us](https://aarogyayogawithshravanthi.com/contact.html) - Booking information, contact details, and location.

## Key Program Details

- **100% Live Sessions**: No pre-recorded videos. Real-time feedback, posture corrections, and personalized attention.
- **Specializations**: Spine therapy (cervical, sciatica, joint pain relief), face yoga for natural rejuvenation, Ayurvedic nutrition guidance, and prenatal/postnatal wellness.
- **Location**: Candeur 40, Miyapur, Hyderabad.
- **Contact Email**: aarogyayoga.official@gmail.com
